problems.headline: The Marketing Clarity Gap
problems.subheadline: Most entrepreneurs face three critical gaps in their marketing approach

problem1.title: Education Without Execution
problem1.description: You know the theory—content marketing, SEO, social media—but struggle to apply it consistently to YOUR business.

problem2.title: Strategy Without Personalization
problem2.description: Generic frameworks don't address your unique market position, budget constraints, or growth stage.

problem3.title: Community Without Credibility
problem3.description: Marketing communities abound, but backing your decisions with proven strategies and peer accountability is rare.

howItWorks.headline: From Strategy to Execution in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subheadline: A proven framework that delivers results

step1.title: Answer, We'll Build
step1.description: Complete our 39-question AI Strategy Builder—designed by marketing experts to extract your unique positioning, audience insights, and growth goals.

step2.title: AI Generates Instantly
step2.description: Our AI engine synthesizes your answers into a comprehensive 15-section strategy deck covering positioning, messaging, channel mix, content pillars, and 90-day roadmap.

step3.title: Execute & Refine
step3.description: Use our 41 interactive templates to operationalize your strategy. Track progress, refine tactics, and measure what's working with built-in analytics.

strategyBuilder.headline: The AI Strategy Builder
strategyBuilder.description: Your personalized marketing strategy, powered by artificial intelligence and grounded in 15+ years of strategic marketing experience.
features: 39 Expert Questions covering positioning, audience, competition, and goals

faq.question: How long does it take to get my strategy?
faq.answer: Your AI-powered strategy is generated instantly after you complete the 39-question builder. Most users get their full 15-section strategy deck within 2-5 minutes of submission.

faq.question: Can I refine my strategy after it's created?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Professional and Enterprise plans include strategy refinements. You can regenerate sections, adjust answers, and get updated strategies as your business evolves.

faq.question: What if I'm not a marketer? Can I still use this?
faq.answer: Yes! The AI Strategy Builder asks questions any business owner can answer—about your goals, audience, and competitive position. No marketing jargon required. All templates are self-explanatory.

faq.question: Is the 90-Day Challenge included in all plans?
faq.answer: The 90-Day Growth Challenge is included in Professional and Enterprise plans. Template Toolkit and Starter Strategy users can purchase it separately for €299.

faq.question: Can I export my strategy and templates?
faq.answer: Yes. Export strategies as PDF or PPTX. Export template data as XLSX or PDF. Professional and Enterprise plans also get a sharable web link for team collaboration.

faq.question: What about team access?
faq.answer: Template Toolkit and Starter Strategy are single-user. Professional plan allows 1-3 team members. Enterprise supports 5-20 seats with full collaboration features and separate team dashboards.

faq.question: Do you offer a refund if I'm not satisfied?
faq.answer: Yes. All Starter Strategy, Professional, and Enterprise purchases come with a 14-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. We're confident you'll see value immediately.

faq.question: Is my data secure? What about privacy?
faq.answer: Your data is encrypted and stored in EU data centers via Supabase. We never sell or share your data. Full GDPR compliance. Read our detailed privacy policy for specifics.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Payments are processed securely through Stripe.

faq.question: Can I change my plan anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Your new pricing will be reflected on your next billing cycle. No penalties or hidden fees.
